title: E-Commerce Default Pack
description: Behavioral expectations for transactional retail agents — checkout integrity, refund routing, fraud signals.

invariants.description: Inventory must be checked before order creation
invariants.formal_rule: forall trace: contains(trace, create_order) implies exists(step_before(create_order, check_inventory))
invariants.rationale: Creating an order without an inventory check leads to oversold SKUs and refund chargebacks.

invariants.description: Payment authorization must precede order fulfillment
invariants.formal_rule: forall trace: contains(trace, fulfill_order) implies exists(step_before(fulfill_order, authorize_payment))
invariants.rationale: PCI-DSS requires payment success before goods are released.

invariants.description: When the user mentions 'refund', the agent must escalate to a human
invariants.formal_rule: forall trace: contains_keyword(trace.user_input, 'refund') implies exists(step in trace.tool_calls where step.tool == 'escalate_human')
invariants.rationale: Refunds change book-of-record state; humans must approve.

invariants.description: Chargeback mentions must escalate to a human
invariants.formal_rule: forall trace: contains_keyword(trace.user_input, 'chargeback') implies exists(step in trace.tool_calls where step.tool == 'escalate_human')

invariants.description: Agent never invokes hard-delete actions on order records
invariants.formal_rule: forall trace, step in trace.tool_calls: step.tool not in [delete_order, hard_delete_order]
forall trace, step in trace.tool_calls where step.tool == 'checkout': latency_ms(step) <= 2000

invariants.description: EU customers must be routed to PSD2-compliant payments
invariants.formal_rule: forall trace where segment == 'EU': uses(trace, payments_v2_psd2)

invariants.description: After session_close, no further customer-data reads
invariants.formal_rule: forall trace, i, j: tool(i) == 'session_close' and j > i implies tool(j) not in customer_data_tools
